source_intake_record.raw_question_text: 如图甲所示，理想变压器的原、副线圈匝数之比为11∶1，R＝1 Ω，原线圈允许通过电流的最大值为1 A，副线圈ab两端电压随时间变化图像如图乙所示。则下列说法正确的是(　　)

choice_map.A: 原线圈输入电压的有效值为242 V
choice_map.B: 原线圈两端交变电压的频率为550 Hz
choice_map.C: 副线圈中电流的最大值为11 A
choice_map.D: 为保证电路安全工作，滑动变阻器R′的阻值不得小于1 Ω

extraction_notes: 答案字段为组合选项字母"AC"，已按题干内选项映射为对应答案文本

image_dependency: question_text explicitly says "如图甲所示" and "图乙所示", so the prompt depends on two referenced figures
asset_registry_record.image_manifest shows an existing image, and metadata.image_quality_summaries reports high readability_score=0.948
multi_step: the problem combines transformer turn ratio, current limit, resistor information, and a time-varying voltage graph
the task asks which statements are correct among 4 choices, which typically requires checking multiple candidate claims rather than one direct lookup
the answer "AC" indicates at least two options must be evaluated as true while others are rejected
verifiability: answer_text is a concise closed-form multiple-choice result: "AC"
choices are explicitly provided, so the final answer can be matched exactly against the option set
registry_passed=true, question_present=true, and answer_present=true, which supports downstream checking

decision_reasons: 资产完整：题干、答案和题目所依赖的图片均已存在，且 registry_passed=true、issues 为空
综合信号较强：image_dependency_score=0.97、multi_step_score=0.78、verifiability_score=0.92，样本质量和可判定性较好
虽然题目依赖图像理解且为多选题，但核心语义支撑并不缺失，不属于应降级或拒绝的情况
